entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: Pennisetum glaucum, the crop studied for growth variability

entities.name: GROWTH VARIABILITY
entities.description: Spatial variation in growth over short distances

entities.name: WEST AFRICAN SAHEL
entities.description: Region where growth variability is a constraint on agricultural experiments

entities.name: NON-DESTRUCTIVE METHODS
entities.description: Techniques used to estimate millet growth and final yields without destroying the plant

entities.name: AERIAL PHOTOGRAPHY
entities.description: Use of true-colour and infrared photographs to monitor growth and evaluate treatment responses

entities.name: GEOREFERENCED RADIOMETRIC MEASUREMENTS
entities.description: Measurements used to obtain NDVI for individual millet hills

entities.name: CHLOROPHYLL METER
entities.description: Tool used to reflect relative differences in plant nitrogen status

entities.name: NITROGEN RATE
entities.description: Experimental factor tested for its effect on pearl millet growth

entities.name: DENSITY
entities.description: Experimental factor tested for its effect on pearl millet growth

entities.name: GENOTYPE
entities.description: Experimental factor tested for its effect on pearl millet growth

entities.name: WESTERN NIGER
entities.description: Specific location where the experiment was conducted

entities.name: NORMALIZED DIFFERENCE VEGETATION INDICES
entities.description: Metric (NDVI) obtained from radiometric measurements to correlate with plant traits

entities.name: TOTAL DRY MATTER
entities.description: Plant total dry matter (TDM) used as a growth indicator

entities.name: LEAF WEIGHT
entities.description: Weight of the leaves used as a growth indicator

entities.name: LEAF AREA
entities.description: Area of the leaves used as a growth indicator

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: Final grain production at harvest

entities.name: PLANT NITROGEN STATUS
entities.description: The nitrogen level in the plant

entities.name: SOIL BACKGROUND REFLECTANCE
entities.description: Factor that requires correction in NDVI measurements

entities.name: INCIDENT LIGHT
entities.description: Factor that requires correction in NDVI measurements

entities.name: SOIL ALBEDO
entities.description: Factor that reduced the effectiveness of the red band in aerial photographs

entities.name: IMAGE VIGNETTING
entities.description: Factor that reduced the effectiveness of the red band in aerial photographs

entities.name: SATELLITE DATA
entities.description: Data used for upscaling ground truth in yield prediction studies
